original_query: select name, deptno > ANY (  select deptno from emp)from dept;
rewritten_query:
SELECT name, deptno > (SELECT MIN(deptno) FROM emp) AS is_greater_than_any
FROM dept;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replace the ANY operator with an equivalent MIN function to avoid materializing the entire list of department numbers from the emp table
Compute the minimum deptno value once instead of comparing against all values from emp table
